history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized anime image shows two young characters in close-up, with large Indonesian text overlaid on top.

The main visual focus is two anime-styled faces framed tightly from the shoulders up. The character on the left has short black hair, light skin, and arched eyebrows, with a purple top visible and one star-like shape near the shoulder area. The character on the right has short brown hair, light skin, and a greenish garment visible at the lower edge of the frame.

The setting appears to be a simple indoor background with muted colors and vertical shapes, rendered in a cartoon style. Lighting is flat and consistent, with the characters and background evenly colored.

Visual details include bold white text with black outlines. The left character’s eyes are dark with highlights, and the right character has a partially open mouth and a slightly turned head toward the left character. The composition is tightly cropped, with the two faces occupying the left and right halves of the image, respectively.

Visible Text:
Nih wafernya
Sekarang kita
berteman

Practical Summary:
The image is an anime-style close-up of two characters looking toward each other. Indonesian text is overlaid across the top and middle of the image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
